rule.name: GitHub Issue Protocol (CERT & STATUS)
rule.directive: GitHub issues follow two patterns based on scope: | Type | Purpose | Scope | Attachments | |------|---------|-------|-------------| | **CERT** | Strategic milestone certification | Comprehensive | Full evidence | | **STATUS** | Tactical workflow check (DEV/SLEEP) | Quick update | Minimal | **CERT validates STATUS:** Certification issues assess delivered items from STATUS reports as part of Definition of Done.
